_README: Firebase Realtime Database security rules for SMA Properties.
1. Go to Firebase Console → Realtime Database → Rules tab
2. Replace the existing rules with the contents of the 'rules' object below
(do NOT copy this _README key — Firebase will reject it)
- /properties: anyone can READ (so the public site works), only admins can WRITE
- /visitors:   anyone can WRITE a new visit (anonymous), only admins can READ the list
(the public hero counter still works because count() goes through visitors-count below)
- /users:      each signed-in user can read/write their OWN profile; admins can read all
- /inquiries:  anyone can WRITE a new inquiry (lead capture), only admins can READ them
So you must set isAdmin: true on a user node BEFORE that user can perform admin writes.
These rules are designed for Firebase Authentication (UID-based).
If you have legacy users from the static site (keyed by sanitized email),
they will need to re-register before they can authenticate.
